Bouračka UI v0.1.0 — install on HP Elite
PREREQUISITES
- Python 3.9 or newer (https://www.python.org/downloads/)
  (verify: open Command Prompt and run `python --version`)
- The Bouračka test repository checked out to a known location, e.g.:
  C:\bouracka-tests\
INSTALL
  pip install bouracka_ui-0.1.0-py3-none-any.whl
RUN
  cd C:\bouracka-tests
  bouracka-ui --workbook BOURACKA-TESTPLAN-v0.4.2.xlsx
  (browser opens to http://localhost:8424/)
WHAT TO DO ON A FAILURE
  1. Check the About page — schema, tools, workbook detection
  2. Click "Diagnostics" on /runs page → downloads diag-*.zip
  3. After any test run, click "Export bundle" on /results/{run_id}
  4. Send both ZIPs back to Pete via email or shared folder
  5. Pete imports the bundle on his side via /runs → "Import bundle"
KNOWN LIMITS
- Sequential framework execution (cypress → playwright → selenium)
  one TC at a time. Total time ~2-5 min per TC across 3 frameworks.
- Workbook (xlsx) cannot be open in Excel while bouracka-ui filing a
  bug — close Excel first, then "+ New Bug", then reopen.
- E2E tests on ENV-TST that require live SMS-OTP cannot fully
  automate the OTP step yet — pick the data-validation portion or
  use Mockoon profiles per INTEGRATION-CONTRACTS-STRATEGY-v0.2 §3.
OPERATOR
  Pete Yamyang — petr.yamyang@gmail.com
